name: @prune/observation-mask
description: F15 — Observation Masking + Belady eviction. Deterministically replaces tool observations older than a sliding window with short, reversible placeholders, capping the O(n^2) growth of an agent transcript at O(n*window). When a hard token budget forces extra drops, orders evictions by Belady's MIN (true optimal when future reuse is known; LRU — Sleator-Tarjan k-competitive — otherwise). Masking is monotone (already-masked stays masked) so the prompt-cache prefix stays stable. Pure math + content hashes; no regex, no model call, no fabricated tokens.
